creator: emaste@freebsd.org
text:
Split out from PR280817 as that one is specific to the crash that Warner encountered.

From https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=280817#c10
> You cannot combine DMAR and bhyve pass-through right now.

Draft patch is at https://reviews.freebsd.org/D25672
